case_title: MONTENEGRO, EDGAR GUARDIAN AD LITEM et al VS WONG, ROBERT

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, ROBERT

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MONTENEGRO, EDGAR GUARDIAN AD LITEM MONTENEGRO, GINA - MINOR AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PETITION FOR MINOR BY AND THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTENEGRO, EDGAR GUARDIAN AD LITEM MONTENEGRO, GINA - MINOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, ROBERT $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,520.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PETITION FOR GUARDIAN AD LITEM-MINOR PLAINTIFF GRANTED BY ORDER OF COURT.
